metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4646
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2. Immunostaining and confocal imaging of hippocampal rat neurons show Neuritin (NRN1/CPG2) is localized to the postsynapse of glutamatergic neurons.

Figure 3. High-magnification images show that within the dendritic spines, Neuritin is localized just beside the PSD. Similar observations were made in subsequent immunoEM experiments (Fig. 4c-e).

Figure 4. cultured hippocampal rat neurons infected with a lentivirus expressing a clathrin light chain A1-GFP fusion protein (green) and stained for CPG2 (red) and PSD-95 (blue) showed co-localization of Neuritin (CPG2) and Clathrin light chain A1 (CLTA) in the postsynapse. Similar observations were made in subsequent immunoEM experiments (Fig. 3b-c).. Experimental description: "Electron Microscopic Immunocytochemistry
Cultures fixed with 4% paraformaldehyde and 0.1% glutaraldehyde or vibratome sections of perfusion-fixed rat hippocampi were immunostained for CPG2"

"Accession Numbers
The GenBank accession number for the cpg2b sequence reported in this paper is AY597251."
which is named "Rattus norvegicus candidate plasticity protein 2b (cPG2B) mRNA, complete cds"

"Mouse monoclonal anti-CPG2 antibody 200A6.1 (IgG1) was generated against the peptide RKLESTLTGLEQSRERQERR (ResGen)."
